title: T-058 — UI: TEC-073 DLQ Manager (PARTIAL — drift resolve modal anchor)
prompt: Build TEC-073 DLQ manager per §13.8. Lists d365_sync_dlq rows with retry / mark-resolved actions. Reuses retry endpoint from T-029. Visual reference: `d365_drift_resolve_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:562-598 (PARTIAL — drift, not DLQ). Use that prototype as the parity anchor for the row-action modal pattern, but render distinct DLQ table layout. RED tests/ui/tec-073-dlq.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-073-dlq.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: DLQ row table + retry + mark-resolved actions.
pipeline_inputs.details: Row click expands to error_message + payload viewer. Bulk retry button (admin only). Threshold banner when DLQ depth > 50.
acceptance_criteria: Given the DLQ page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:562-598 (drift resolve modal as row-action anchor) and the UX contract at UX:1280, then table columns, row action modal layout, and Retry/Resolve buttons match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL with parity checklist in details.
Given DLQ depth > 50, when rendered, then warning banner appears.
Given user lacks technical.d365.sync.trigger, when on page, then row actions are disabled.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + threshold banner + RBAC.
risk_red_lines: Do not show secrets in payload viewer.
